history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person, gender ambiguous, is captured in a medium shot from the chest up, wearing a black zip-up hoodie with the hood pulled up over their head, obscuring their face. Their hands are on either side of the hood, pulling it down slightly, revealing dark, messy hair. The hoodie has a white graphic design on the front, featuring the word "FREES" in a stylized, dripping font, with small starbursts around it. Below "FREES," smaller text reads "SUNMORY" with a sun and moon icon. A few other small, indistinct logos or graphics are visible near the bottom of the hoodie.

The background is a plain, bright white wall, with a minimalist white shelf mounted high on the left side. On the shelf, a small black rectangular object, possibly a box or book, sits next to a white pot containing a dark green, spiky plant.

The image is rendered in a high-contrast black and white, with a slightly grainy, vintage aesthetic. The lighting is soft and diffused, coming from the front, casting subtle shadows. The overall mood is one of casual anonymity and youthful introspection. The style is reminiscent of street photography or editorial fashion with a modern, urban edge.
